subcodes.first_line: My tongue, my heart, my pen and my limbs bear witness to the oneness and singleness of God, and that He is the All-Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یشهد لسانی و قلبی و قلمی و جوارحی بوحدانیه الله و فردانیته و بانه هو المقتدر
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement
